headline: Medtronic: Expectations Are Low And That's The Opportunity
summary: Medtronic is rated a Buy, seeing limited downside and gradual upside from consistent execution and incremental margin gains. Read more on MDT stock here.

headline: Why Intuitive Surgical Is a Strong Buy as Robotic Surgery Adoption Accelerates
summary: Robotic surgery’s market leader has had a rough start to 2026, but our model sees the pullback as an opportunity. Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) trades at $482.22 after a 14.86% year-to-date decline, even as Q1 procedure growth and da Vinci 5 adoption continue to accelerate. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for Intuitive Surgical is $615.93, ... Why Intuitive Surgical Is a Strong Buy as Robotic Surgery Adoption Accelerates

headline: SquareMind Raises $18 Million to Redefine Skin Exams With Robotics and AI
summary: PARIS, April 27, 2026--SquareMind raises $18 million to redefine skin exams with the Swan robotic skin imaging platform.
